name: wide-lens-engineering
description: Practical and externally anchored software delivery with elastic task-DAG coordination.

interface.longDescription: Code, debug, refactor, and review through a practical workflow or an externally anchored assured protocol with elastic task-DAG delegation.
defaultPrompt: Fix this bug with the smallest verified change.
Use elastic read-only peers where they add evidence.
Plan an assured delivery for this high-risk change.
